# opencode-cli-mcp — Full Context

**Version:** 0.1.0  
**FastMCP:** 3.2.4  
**Python:** 3.13  
**License:** MIT  

---

## What It Does

Bridges [opencode](https://opencode.ai/) (the open source AI coding agent) into the MCP ecosystem. AI assistants (Claude, etc.) can use this server to delegate implementation tasks to opencode running on cheaper models — enabling tiered model economics.

---

## Architecture

```
┌──────────────┐    stdio     ┌──────────────────┐    httpx     ┌──────────────┐
│  MCP Clients │◄───────────►│  opencode-cli-mcp │◄───────────►│ opencode serve│
│  (Claude…)   │     MCP      │  (FastMCP 3.2.4) │   :4096     │  (opencode)   │
└──────────────┘              └──────────────────┘              └──────┬───────┘
                                                                       │ subprocess
                                                                  ┌────▼───────┐
                                                                  │ opencode   │
                                                                  │ agent run  │
                                                                  └────────────┘
                                                                  
┌────────────────┐   proxy   ┌──────────────────┐   httpx    ┌──────────────────┐
│ Vite/React SPA │──────────►│  FastAPI Backend  │──────────►│  opencode serve  │
│    :10950      │  /api/*   │     :10951        │   :4096   │                  │
└────────────────┘           └──────────────────┘            └──────────────────┘
```

## Repository Structure

```
opencode-cli-mcp/
├── api/
│   ├── main.py              # FastAPI app entry
│   └── routes/
│       ├── capabilities.py  # GET /api/capabilities
│       ├── fleet.py         # GET /api/fleet (port scanner)
│       ├── proxy.py         # CORS proxy for frontend
│       ├── settings.py      # GET/PUT /api/settings
│       ├── system.py        # GET /api/system, /api/health
│       └── tools.py         # GET /api/tools (from registry)
├── src/opencode_cli_mcp/
│   ├── server.py            # FastMCP 3.2 app
│   ├── client.py            # httpx client → opencode serve
│   ├── job_store.py         # Async job tracking
│   ├── registry.py          # Shared tool definitions
│   └── tools/
│       ├── agent.py         # opencode_run_agent
│       ├── runs.py          # Job status/polling
│       ├── sessions.py      # Session CRUD
│       └── status.py        # opencode health/config
├── tests/
│   ├── conftest.py
│   └── test_server.py       # 3 registration tests
├── web_sota/                # React dashboard
│   ├── src/
│   │   ├── App.tsx          # Router (9 pages)
│   │   ├── Layout.tsx       # Shell
│   │   ├── store.ts         # Zustand state
│   │   ├── services/api.ts  # HTTP client
│   │   └── pages/           # Dashboard, Sessions, Chat, Tools, etc.
│   ├── vite.config.ts       # :10950, proxy /api → :10951
│   └── package.json
├── start.ps1                # Fleet-standard startup
├── start.bat                # Double-click wrapper
├── justfile                 # just test / just lint / just check
├── glama.json               # MCP discovery
├── CLAUDE.md                # Agent instructions
├── llms.txt                 # This file (concise)
└── llms-full.txt            # This file (full context)
```

## MCP Tools (14 total)

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `opencode_run_agent` | Run agent prompt, returns job_id |
| `opencode_get_run_status` | Poll run output/status |
| `opencode_cancel_run` | Cancel running agent |
| `opencode_list_runs` | List recent/active runs |
| `opencode_list_sessions` | List opencode sessions |
| `opencode_get_session` | Get session details |
| `opencode_get_session_messages` | Get session messages |
| `opencode_get_session_diff` | Get session file diffs |
| `opencode_get_session_files` | Get session file list |
| `opencode_get_status` | Get opencode health/config |
| `opencode_get_config` | Get opencode config |
| `opencode_get_providers` | Get available providers |
| `opencode_get_models` | Get available models |
| `opencode_get_project` | Get project info |

## API Routes

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | /api/health | Service health |
| GET | /api/system | System stats (CPU, mem, GPU) |
| GET | /api/tools | Tool list from MCP registry |
| GET | /api/capabilities | Server capabilities |
| GET | /api/fleet | Fleet port scanner |
| GET | /api/opencode/status | opencode serve health |
| GET | /api/opencode/sessions | Session list |
| GET | /api/opencode/sessions/{id} | Session detail |
| GET | /api/opencode/sessions/{id}/diff | File diffs |
| GET | /api/opencode/sessions/{id}/files | File list |
| GET | /api/runs | Run list |
| GET | /api/runs/{id} | Run detail |
| GET | /api/settings | Get settings |
| PUT | /api/settings | Update settings |
| GET | /api/ollama/status | Ollama availability |

## Startup

```powershell
.\start.ps1              # All services (zombie kill + install + launch)
.\start.bat              # Double-click wrapper
```

Run individually:
```powershell
uv run python -m api.main           # Backend :10951
Set-Location web_sota; npm run dev  # Frontend :10950
opencode serve --port 4096          # opencode HTTP API
```

## Build/Test

```powershell
uv run pytest              # 3 tests
just test                  # same
just lint                  # ruff check
just check                 # tsc --noEmit (frontend)
```

## Ports

| Port | Service |
|------|---------|
| 10950 | Vite dev server (React) |
| 10951 | FastAPI backend |
| 4096 | opencode serve HTTP API |

## Dependencies

**Python:** fastmcp>=3.2.4, fastapi>=0.136.1, uvicorn>=0.30.0, httpx>=0.28.0, pydantic>=2.13.0  
**Node:** react 19, vite 5.4, tailwindcss 3.4, framer-motion 11, zustand 5, lucide-react  
**Dev:** ruff, pytest, pytest-asyncio, typescript

**Run via:** uv (Python), npm/Node 24 (frontend)

## Notes

- `opencode serve` must be running separately (installed globally via npm)
- Frontend proxies `/api/*`, `/docs`, `/openapi.json`, `/redoc` to backend
- Fleet port scanner in fleet.py probes all WEBAPP_PORTS.md entries
- Ollama auto-detected on port 11434
